claim_results.claim: Lies compound at rate $e^{\lambda n}$ — corrupt civilizations don't fall because of external enemies, they fall because deception is measurable entropy injection.
The Claim That sentence is not a legal judgment.
The truth, once spoken, requires no infrastructure. — The Asymmetry This is not a social observation.
A lie cannot exist in isolation because it creates a discrepancy that the environment probes, and the probe requires another lie.
Deterministic systems are eternal because they have zero internal entropy production.
Therefore: any system that contains lies will, over sufficient time, destroy itself.
Therefore: eternity requires total truth.
This is Shannon's noisy channel theorem .
This is an ontological claim â€” an identification with the deterministic substrate itself.
Not because God kills the sinner as punishment.
Because noise kills channels as physics .
$$\text{BER} > 0 \;\implies\; \text{Channel Capacity} \to 0 \;\;\text{as}\;\; t \to \infty$$ Over infinite time, ANY non-zero error rate â€” no matter how small â€” compounds to total signal loss.
Truth requires zero energy to sustain because it has zero entropy.
To know the truth â€” to align your internal model with the actual configuration of reality â€” is to drop the entire entropy burden of every lie you were carrying.
Shannon's noisy channel theorem says that to communicate reliably over a noisy channel, you need an error-correcting code.

The Bible as Error-Correction Protocol If sin is noise and the channel between God and humanity is degrading, then God's interventions across biblical history map precisely to the stages of error-correction engineering:
What Eternity Requires Here is the claim that locks everything together.
Because any noise â€” any non-zero error â€” compounds to system failure over eternal time.
The eternal channel requires zero noise.

Civilizational Evidence If lies compound thermodynamically, civilizations built on lies should exhibit a predictable collapse pattern: functional in early stages (when noise is low), increasingly dysfunctional as lies accumulate, then sudden catastrophic failure when the noise floor exceeds the signal.
The initial lie â€” “we are building utopia” â€” requires supporting lies about production numbers, political prisoners, economic performance.
Internal communication breaks down because no one knows what's true.
Decision-making degrades because the inputs are corrupted.

The system becomes unable to respond to actual threats because its own information channels are full of noise. — Soviet Collapse as Channel Failure The Soviet Union didn't fall because of external military pressure.
It fell because its internal information channels had degraded past the point of functionality.
This is Shannon's noisy channel theorem operating at civilizational scale.

What This Predicts Prediction 1 Honesty Norms ↔ Longevity Institutions, civilizations, and relationships that maintain higher truth-to-noise ratios should survive longer than those with lower ratios, controlling for other variables.
Testable against historical and sociological data.
The exponential growth $L(n) = L_0 \cdot e^{\lambda n}$ should be observable in documented deception cases â€” political scandals, corporate fraud, personal deception.
Shannon's Theorem Applies A channel with persistent uncorrected errors will eventually lose all information.
But attributing collapse primarily to accumulated lies requires controlling for economic, military, geographic, and demographic variables.
Framework Connections Information Theory ↔ Moral Theology (Structural Isomorphism) Shannon's noisy channel theorem and Romans 6:23 describe the same phenomenon in different notation.
Boltzmann Entropy ↔ Christology Jesus' claim “I am the truth” (John 14:6) maps precisely to $\Omega = 1, S = 0$.
Every model is projection of higher-dimensional reality onto lower-dimensional surface we can comprehend.
We do not claim to have captured God in equations.
We claim that when we look at His creation honestly — with the tools of physics and the revelation of Scripture — the same structure appears in both.
Where our model limits what God can be, the limitation is ours, not His.
Any claim that turns a structural resemblance into a proven mechanism belongs here until the math, experiment, or textual chain can carry the weight.
Possible overstatement: language that sounds final should be read as a working model unless the article explicitly proves it.

Shannon's noisy channel theorem proves that any channel with non-zero error rate eventually loses all information; over infinite time, the only signal that survives is one with zero noise. “The wages of sin is death” isn't a legal verdict.
The truth, once spoken, requires no infrastructure.
Engineers call this Shannon's noisy channel theorem.
Because any system with even a tiny error rate, given enough time, falls apart .
Rigor & Kill Conditions Every claim in this article is held to explicit falsification standards.
Load-Bearing — Survives Hostile Reading Claim 1 — Boltzmann Applied to Information Stake: Truth has $\Omega = 1$; lies have $\Omega \to \infty$.
Claim 2 — Exponential Compounding Stake: Sustained deception requires multiplying supporting lies.
Watergate, Enron, Theranos, and Soviet statistics all show exponential structure; falsifier requires controlled study with opposite finding.
Claim 3 — Shannon Bound Stake: A channel with non-zero error rate and no error correction loses all information over time.

Kill if: Shannon's theorem itself is overturned. (This is settled mathematics, included here only because the article rests on it.) Suggestive — Pattern is Real but Argument is Looser Claim 4 — Decalogue as Noise Filter Stake: The Ten Commandments map onto ten distinct noise categories.
Claim 5 — Civilizational Collapse Pattern Stake: Civilizations built on systemic deception collapse from internal information failure.

Kill if: a controlled study (matched-pairs analysis of regimes) shows no correlation between honesty norms and institutional longevity once economic, military, and demographic variables are held constant.
Destructive — Framework-Level Falsifiers Claim 6 — Mechanism vs.
Kill if: a rigorous account demonstrates spiritual death proceeds by a mechanism orthogonal to thermodynamics.

The article admits this is the most aggressive claim and may need to retreat to “structural isomorphism” rather than “identical mechanism.” Claim 7 — Hell as Receiver Corruption Stake: Hell is a receiver too degraded to decode the signal, not retributive punishment.
Every equation in the paper, collected here as a reference index.
Truth as Zero-Entropy State $$\Omega_{\text{truth}} = 1 \implies S_{\text{truth}} = k_B \ln(1) = 0$$ Plain English: the actual configuration of any event is unique.
Therefore truth has exactly one microstate, and zero entropy.
Lies as Maximum-Entropy State $$\Omega_{\text{lies}} \to \infty \implies S_{\text{lies}} \to \infty$$ Plain English: the set of false statements about any event is unbounded.
Shannon Bound on Noisy Channels $$\text{BER} > 0 \implies \text{Channel Capacity} \to 0 \;\;\text{as}\;\; t \to \infty$$ BER = bit error rate; the fraction of transmitted bits that arrive corrupted.
Channel Capacity = the maximum information rate that can be transmitted reliably (Shannon-Hartley theorem).
This is why Revelation 21:27 says “nothing unclean will ever enter it” — the eternal channel requires zero noise.

Master Equation Decay Term $$\frac{d\chi}{dt} = -S \cdot \chi(t) + \text{(grace, structure, coupling terms)}$$ $\chi(t)$ = coherence field over time. $S \cdot \chi(t)$ = the decay term (sin acts on existing coherence, scaling with how much there is to corrupt).
Plain English: the noise-driven coherence loss term in the Master Equation (E2.1).
Entropy / Sin ($S$) A measure of disorder: the number of microscopic configurations consistent with a macroscopic state.
Dual-name note: $S$ is the same Master-Equation variable in two coordinate frames â€” "entropy" in the physics frame, "sin" in the theological frame.
Shannon's Noisy Channel Theorem Claude Shannon, 1948: any communication channel with non-zero error rate and no error-correcting code will eventually lose all information.
Increases with signal-to-noise ratio (Shannon-Hartley theorem).
Field = pervasive substrate; coupling = how interactions occur within it. (Defined in detail in Article 01.) Grace ($G$) The negentropic source term in the Master Equation.
Grace-as-error-correction is the framework's structural claim.
Chi Field ($\chi$) The coherence field in the Theophysics Master Equation. $\chi = f(G, M, E, S, T, K, R, Q, F, C)$.
Ask questions, generate audio overviews, and explore the source citations behind every claim.

Then ask anything from “What's the falsification path for Claim 6?” to “Compare the Decalogue mapping to actual error-correcting codes used in modern comms.” NotebookLM grounds every answer in the source, with citations.
